---
title: "Calories Burnt Prediction using Machine Learning"
description: "The Gradient Boosting Regressor model provides 99% accuracy in prediction of Calories Burn."
image: featured.jpg
image-alt: images
categories:
  - Machine Learning 
  - Calories Burnt
  - Epidemiology
  - Public Health
about:
  template: solana
  image: featured.png
---
